A character-build preset, not verified game-mechanics reference — excluded
from the index the same way ja/ko locale duplicates are (see `wiki.py`'s
module docstring). Mentions mining and ore repeatedly so a broken exclusion
filter would make this page (wrongly) compete with skills/mining.md.
